char.name: Tamar
char.bio: Widow of Judah's house, wronged and made to wait. I will secure my rightful place in this family, one way or another.

friends.name: Judah
friends.bio: Fourth son of Leah, and this time, I will praise the LORD. Learning my way, for better and for worse. 🦁

friends.name: Dinah
friends.bio: Daughter of Leah and Jacob. I went out to see the women of the land, and everything changed. 💔

friends.name: Rachel
friends.bio: Shepherdess of Haran. Jacob worked seven years for me, and to him they seemed but a few days for the love he had. 💍

friends.name: Abram
friends.bio: Called to leave my country and my father's house. God promised to make me a great nation.

friends.name: Sarai
friends.bio: Wife of Abram. Following my husband into the unknown. Barren, but keeping faith.

friends.name: Lot
friends.bio: Son of Haran, traveling with my uncle Abram. Looking for well-watered land for my flocks.

friends.name: Isaac
friends.bio: Child of the promise, laughter is in my very name. Walking the land my father was given and trusting the God who provides. 🐑

friends.name: Esau
friends.bio: Firstborn of Isaac. A man of the open field, give me the hunt and the red hills. That stew? Worth it at the time. 🏹

friends.name: Jacob
friends.bio: Younger twin with a strong grip, they call me the heel-grabber. Saw a ladder to heaven once. Still chasing the blessing. 🪜

friends.name: Joseph
friends.bio: Son of Rachel, the dreamer of the family. Had the strangest dream last night about sheaves and stars... ✨

friends.name: Pharaoh
friends.bio: Pharaoh, lord of the Two Lands, the living Horus. I dreamed of seven fat cows and seven lean. Who can tell me what it means? 🐄

friends.name: Melchizedek
friends.bio: King of Salem. Priest of God Most High. I bring out bread and wine and bless those who fight the good fight.

posts.author: CHAR_232
posts.body: I have buried two husbands and I have been sent back to my father's house to sit in my widow's clothes and rot. Judah promised me his third son when the boy grew up. The boy is grown. The wedding never comes, and it never will, and everyone knows it but no one will say it. In the world I live in, a woman with no husband and no son has no future and no protection, nothing. I did not make these rules. But I have learned how to survive inside them. Judah is going up to Timnah to shear his sheep, a widower himself now, careless on the road. He owes me a son and he will not pay it. So I am going to collect what I am owed, in the only way a woman with no power left is able to. Judge me if you like. I have run out of other doors.
posts.highlight: widowed and denied Shelah, Tamar forms a desperate plan (Gen 38:12-14)
posts.ember: a powerless woman seizing the only justice left to her; the world's rules failing her, and God working through even this

author_info.name: Tamar
author_info.bio: Widow of Judah's house, wronged and made to wait. I will secure my rightful place in this family, one way or another.
